TestCase z13Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_z = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_z, t1.z, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.z = follow_case_z;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Less than 2 elements, nothing to reverse, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule: reverse the entire array
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n / 2; ++i) {
        double temp = follow_case.z[i];
        follow_case.z[i] = follow_case.z[follow_case.n - 1 - i];
        follow_case.z[follow_case.n - 1 - i] = temp;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
